name: Lala's Creamery
tagline: Handmade small-batch ice cream from organic, grass-fed milk.
seoDescription: Lala's Creamery — handmade small-batch ice cream from organic grass-fed milk, from-scratch baked goods, and a classic soda fountain in downtown Petaluma.

hero.heading: Small batches. Big scoops.
hero.subheading: Handmade ice cream from organic, grass-fed milk, from-scratch baked goods, and an old-fashioned soda fountain in downtown Petaluma.

about.heading: About Lala's Creamery
body: Lala's Creamery makes ice cream the slow way — handmade in small batches from organic milk sourced from grass-fed cows, with from-scratch baked goods made from local, natural, and organic ingredients.
There’s always a rotating lineup of vegan, dairy-free, and gluten-free options, served at a classic soda-fountain counter in the heart of downtown Petaluma.

services.title: Small-batch ice cream
services.description: Handmade in small batches from organic milk sourced from grass-fed cows.

services.title: Vegan & dairy-free scoops
services.description: A rotating selection of vegan, dairy-free, and gluten-free flavors made in-house.

services.title: From-scratch baked goods
services.description: Cookies, cones, and treats baked from scratch with local, natural ingredients.

services.title: Classic soda fountain
services.description: Floats, sundaes, and shakes served at an old-fashioned soda-fountain counter.

items.a: You'll find us at 134 Petaluma Blvd N, Petaluma, CA 94952.
Mon – Thu: 12:00 PM – 9:30 PM; Fri – Sat: 12:00 PM – 10:00 PM; Sunday: 12:00 PM – 9:30 PM.
We proudly serve Petaluma, CA and the surrounding community.

items.q: How do I get in touch?
items.a: Call us at (707) 774-6567 — we're glad to help.
